_comment: Default Claude Code settings emitted by coding-agents installer. NOTE: this lives at ~/.claude/settings.json, which is user-overridable. For TRUE managed enforcement (cannot be overridden), v2 will write to /etc/claude-code/managed-settings.json (requires hpcsupport / root). See docs/v2-deferred.md item D5. Sprint 1 Task 1.8 added the $schema ref so the user's editor can validate; disableBypassPermissionsMode kept as the string "disable" pending verification against https://json.schemastore.org/claude-code-settings.json — if that schema later requires a boolean, update both this template and tests/test_policy_emit.py::test_managed_settings_template_has_correct_nesting in lockstep.
